tasks.subject: Story B-1: Check Quality of Entire Workspace
tasks.description: Implement `gatekeeper check` command that evaluates all source files in the current directory. Output shows overall Quality Score out of 100, pillar breakdown, and specific findings with file names and line numbers.

tasks.subject: Story B-2: See Readable Findings in Terminal
tasks.description: Implement TerminalReporter with lipgloss-formatted, color-coded table output. High-priority findings in red, ordered by priority. Support --format=pretty and --format=json flags.

tasks.subject: Story B-3: Receive Actionable Remediation Suggestions
tasks.description: Every finding includes a remediation suggestion in plain language, referencing specific code location. Remediations are prioritized by impact.

tasks.subject: Story B-4: Skip Analysis for Trivial Changes
tasks.description: Changes affecting only .md, .txt, or non-code files trigger immediate pass. Whitespace-only changes also pass. Skip message is clear. Does not apply to full workspace check.

tasks.subject: Story C-1: Check Quality of Changes Between Two Branches
tasks.description: Implement `gatekeeper diff --base=main --target=feature` using go-git. Only changed files/lines are analyzed. Output shows per-pillar impact of changes.

tasks.subject: Story C-2: Check Quality of Specific Commit Range
tasks.description: Implement `gatekeeper commit-range --range=HEAD~3..HEAD`. Only changes in specified commits are analyzed. Findings are attributable to specific commits.

tasks.subject: Story C-3: Generate Markdown Summary for PRs
tasks.description: Implement --format=markdown output. Includes overall score, pillar breakdown, and top findings. Concise enough for a single PR comment.

tasks.subject: Story D-1: Deterministic Pass/Fail Exit Codes
tasks.description: Exit code 0 = pass, 1 = runtime error, 2 = fail. Consistent and deterministic. Exit code returned after all output flushed.

tasks.subject: Story D-2: Machine-Readable JSON Output
tasks.description: Implement --format=json output with overall score, per-pillar scores, all findings with locations, and timestamp.

tasks.subject: Story D-3: Block Deployment on Critical Security Issues
tasks.description: Hard-fail toggle for critical security findings. Any critical/high severity finding triggers fail regardless of score. Output identifies which finding triggered the block.

tasks.subject: Story D-4: Enforce Mutation Testing Coverage Requirements
tasks.description: Configure minimum mutation coverage threshold (default 80%). Below threshold → Verification pillar reduced by 20%. Output explains penalty.

tasks.subject: Story E-1: Evaluate Code Readability and Intent
tasks.description: Flag variables/functions with names that obscure purpose. Each flag includes suggested improvement. Evaluation considers surrounding context.

tasks.subject: Story E-2: Detect Code Duplication and DRY Violations
tasks.description: Identify blocks of logically identical or near-identical code across files. Show both locations and recommendation for extraction.

tasks.subject: Story E-3: Configure Custom LLM Provider for On-Premise
tasks.description: Configure custom base URL, API key env var, timeout, model name, and temperature=0. Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

tasks.subject: Story F-1: Prevent Secrets from Leaving Network
tasks.description: Scan code for secret patterns (API keys, passwords, tokens). Replace with [REDACTED] before transmission. Configurable toggle. Warning when secrets detected.

tasks.subject: Story F-2: Disable Cloud Transmission Entirely
tasks.description: Config flag prohibits all public cloud transmission. Falls back to rule-based evaluation only. Clear message when LLM is unavailable.

tasks.subject: Story F-3: Transmit Only Changed Code
tasks.description: Only changed functions/classes sent for LLM analysis. Surrounding context limited to immediate parent scope. Unchanged files never transmitted.

tasks.subject: Story G-1: Fast Feedback on Small Changes
tasks.description: Commits with <10 files complete within 300ms. Fast path for simple changes without LLM analysis.

tasks.subject: Story G-2: Handle LLM Failures Gracefully
tasks.description: Retry up to 2 times on LLM failure. Fall back to rule-based scoring. Output indicates LLM unavailable. Valid exit code in fallback mode.

tasks.subject: Story G-3: Clear Error Messages
tasks.description: Clear, actionable error messages for: missing config, invalid JSON, unreachable LLM, missing API key, unreadable path. All use exit code 1.
